_confidence_levels.high: Confirmed from primary source (official operator doc, hyperscaler page, government gazette)
_confidence_levels.medium: Derived from multiple secondary sources with reasonable confidence
_confidence_levels.low: Estimated from limited or indirect sources — treat with caution
